title: ContentVersion
description: A version record for a CFR section or appendix as returned by GET /api/versioner/v1/versions/title-{title}.json.

date.description: Date on which this version was effective (YYYY-MM-DD).

amendment_date.description: Date of the amendment that produced this version (YYYY-MM-DD).

issue_date.description: Date on which this content was issued in the Federal Register (YYYY-MM-DD).

part.description: Part number this section belongs to.

removed.description: Whether this content was removed in this version.
